workflow.name: Automate any workflow
workflow.description: Set up CI/CD and automate your development tasks with GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Open Platform menu
steps.description: Click on the Platform menu to discover automation tools like GitHub Actions.

steps.title: Select GitHub Actions
steps.description: Click on Actions in the Platform menu to explore automation and CI/CD features.

steps.title: Get started with Actions
steps.description: Click 'Get started with actions' to learn how to set up your first CI/CD pipeline.
